subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Praise be to God that ye are confirmed, assisted and steadfast in service to the Cause of God and in servitude unto His Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی الحمد لله موفقید و موید و قائمید بخدمت امرالله و عبودیت حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement
